steps.title: Spot the contextual signal
steps.content: The blank parallels 'illuminate the Pleistocene epoch' and 'reveal important details.' Misliya-1's remains help researchers identify or make out evolutionary steps.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Discern means to perceive or distinguish clearly — a perfect fit for figuring out evolutionary steps. 'Yield,' 'prioritize,' and 'exploit' don't capture identifying or recognizing.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
